productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Zeitfrei Thong Brown Flip Flops
description: Designed with a sophisticated look, these adidas flip flops are absolutely comfortable and stylish. With quick drying properties, these slides make for great footwear even in wet conditions. Upper Leather and synthetic strap, lightly padded and lined in mesh for breathablilty and comfort Thong style strap to hold flip flop to foot adidas logo on the strap for style Highly padded and extra soft FitFoam footbed for ultimate comfort Outsole Injected EVA outsole for lightweight comfort Diagonal grooves on the outsole for absolute grip and traction even on wet surfaces Flip flop care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Not for shower use
